text: Hello, I'm your Remote Expert. I see you've been assigned a field repair job. Let me start the scoping assessment. Can you confirm the equipment type and severity level you're working with?
Confirmed. I'm working on the equipment as configured in the job details.
Thank you. Before we proceed, I need you to visually inspect the unit. Look for any visible damage, corrosion, or loose connections. Can you describe what you see?
I've completed the visual inspection. The unit appears to be in good physical condition — no visible damage or corrosion detected.
Excellent. Now please check the diagnostic panel. Are there any active error codes or warning lights on the control board?
Checking the diagnostic panel now. I can see three warning lights on the secondary controller board.

Warning lights on the secondary controller board — noted. Based on the initial assessment, this appears to be a firmware calibration issue. We'll proceed with the repair documentation. Please move to the repair tab when ready.
Understood. Moving to the repair documentation phase.
